llm_response:
Hey there, I am writing to check on the registration details for your upcoming event happening next month. Could you please provide more information about the specific dates and any early bird deadlines? I want to make sure I don't miss the window to complete my registration before it closes.

I am also curious about the total fees involved since the budget for my team is quite tight right now. Please let me know if there are different rates for students or if the standard registration fee covers all the workshops. It would be super helpful to get a clear breakdown so we can plan our finances accordingly.

Thanks so much for your help with this, and I hope to see you there soon! Let me know if you need any extra info from my side to speed up the registration process. Looking forward to hearing back from you very soon!
